moods.name: drive
moods.description: Positive high-energy. Confident, upbeat, forward momentum. For tips, demos, hot takes, founder segments.
moods.generation_prompt: Upbeat confident electronic beat, positive energy, clean synths, driving rhythm, consistent tempo, modern and polished, stable percussion, no vocals, exactly 120 BPM

moods.name: steady
moods.description: Positive low-energy. Calm, unobtrusive, sits behind narration. For tutorials, deep dives, long-form.
moods.generation_prompt: Calm ambient background music, warm pads, gentle and unobtrusive, positive but subtle, consistent soft rhythm, designed to sit behind narration, stable tempo, no vocals, exactly 80 BPM

research: Having music matters more than which music — EEG shows attention increase vs silence regardless of tempo (PMC9713244)
Positive valence + high arousal = best retention and recall (PMC11045806)
Stable rhythm drives positive emotions; flowing rhythm drives melancholy (PMC9644217)
Music regulates mood first, then arousal — mood precedes arousal in causal chain (PMC11045806)
Custom-scored music can be less engaging than generic well-matched music (arxiv 2601.17893v1)
Drive at 120 BPM for seamless cuts; steady at 80 BPM (2:3 ratio) for rhythmic compatibility
